key_insights.insight: Being able to rapidly interpret nonverbal cues gives a significant advantage in all aspects of life.
key_insights.quote: Imagine being able to apperceive things way ahead of time because you can read other people and circumstances faster.

key_insights.insight: Dominating and controlling time during a negotiation gives you an advantage.
key_insights.quote: Whoever dominates and controls time, controls.

key_insights.insight: Emotional responses are vital and override cognitive processing in important situations; ignoring them is detrimental.
key_insights.quote: That is absolutely not how we evolved. We evolved to deal with emotions because emotions keep us alive.

key_insights.insight: Initial assessments of people occur within the first three milliseconds of interaction.
key_insights.quote: We now know that that assessment is made in the first three milliseconds. That's faster than your blink rate.

key_insights.insight: Synchronizing with someone by mirroring their actions or behaviors increases harmony and receptiveness.
key_insights.quote: The faster we can synchronize, the faster we can harmonize.

key_insights.insight: Humans are pre-programmed to adapt to that which dominates for improved success and fitting in.
key_insights.quote: That we are already programmed to adapt to that which dominates so that we can fit better.

key_insights.insight: Covering or touching the neck, especially the suprasternal notch, indicates a lack of confidence or insecurity.
key_insights.quote: What I found is when there's lack of confidence, insecurities, fear, apprehensions, or concerns, that people will go, oh my God,did you see that?

key_insights.insight: Using a lower, more controlled tone of voice is crucial for projecting authority and confidence.
key_insights.quote: A confident person doesn't have to talk fast and doesn't talk high.

key_insights.insight: It's essential to create psychological comfort during negotiations, by allowing others to share their perspective.
key_insights.quote: What you're negotiating for is can you create enough psychological comfort that the other person can live with that?

key_insights.insight: One of the key traits of exceptional people is their skill at observing the environment and human interactions.
key_insights.quote: Hire good observers, because they're going to save you.

actionable_advice.advice: When entering a room, deliberately pause in the doorway, scan the room to create dominance.
actionable_advice.how_to: Open the door, take a moment to ensure the room is safe and there's nobody in here.

actionable_advice.advice: Practice lowering the tone of your voice, especially when saying no, to project more authority.
actionable_advice.how_to: Consciously speak from the diaphragm and avoid upward inflections at the end of sentences.

actionable_advice.advice: If someone is aggressive or confrontational, take control of time by slowing down the interaction.
actionable_advice.how_to: Become very visual, begin to write things down.

actionable_advice.advice: When interviewing someone, focus on their problem-solving skills by asking about the problems they have solved and the emotion connected to solving.
actionable_advice.how_to: How efficiently did you do it? The person who solves the problem goes into the detail and feels the emotion of the person that's telling the story,only conveys it, but doesn't know the emotion that is attached to solving it.

actionable_advice.advice: To show you care, do something pro-social or beneficial for someone, but don't wait.
actionable_advice.how_to: When someone ask for help, respond quickly instead of taking your time.

memorable_stories: The story of the Roderick James Ramsey, the spy caught because his cigarette shook when a particular name was mentioned.
The story of catching an illegal immigrant spy in the USA because he was holding flowers bouquet down.
The story of Thomas Edison who dropped out of school at six and sought the knowledge.
contrarian_claims: Attempting to reduce everything that's emotional is not how we evolved.
Don't try to be perfect. Aim for being accurate 75-80 percent of the time.
Taking notes is not an effective way to show you care, as observing is more important than writing.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Former FBI Agent: If They Do This Please RUN! Narcissists Favourite Trick To Control You! They're Controlling You Like A Puppet!
